## Problem

<!-- What are you trying to do that the current package makes hard? -->

## Proposed behavior

<!-- What would you like to happen? CLI flag, MCP tool change, docs, ...? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Workarounds you tried, other tools, etc. -->

## Scope notes

<!-- This project is local-first and governance-first by design:
     no default telemetry, no silent writes, no required cloud.
     Requests that conflict with those boundaries need a strong case. -->
